text: Implemented checked CSRUnionPlan and CSRProductPlan analysis with deterministic canonical result patterns, exact immutable-pattern identity validation, union input mappings, grouped product contribution mappings, and reusable encapsulated CSRValuesDestination replay/snapshot ownership. Numeric cancellation remains explicit until prune. Added dense oracles, 60-seed randomized pattern/numeric laws, changed-input/destination errors, repeated rebinding, and zero-size tests. Verification: all 81 sparse tests pass on JVM and all 81 on Scala.js; benchCompile and optimized JS smoke pass. n=128 JMH: union replay 0.682 B/op, 0.284 us; product replay 1.550 B/op, 0.775 us. Union analysis 6.526 us and ordinary add 1.481 us, so analysis plus 10 replays is 9.366 us vs 14.810 us and breaks even at about six replays. JS replay reports zero owned results plus one destination and plan reuse per op.
